name: Figtree Holdings Limited
summary: Figtree Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs and builds commercial and industrial facilities in Singapore and China. It operates through Design and Build, and Property Development segments. The company also constructs, develops, sells, and/or leases residential, commercial, and industrial properties; and provides design, project and construction management, and consulting services, as well as general building engineering services. In addition, it undertakes A&A works on existing buildings; and engages in the refurbishment and upgrading of existing buildings. Figtree Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Singapore.
